column1: Hey Lily, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hi! We will be in Punta Cana the 2nd to 7th of march
dope thats where i'll be! did you already book something?
we have a hotel yes - occidental punta
ok cool, were you looking to purchase a party pass?
we didn't know we needed one but someone said it was necessary to get in places and be safe
we also want to get in a booze cruise
word lets get you situated, how many ppl in your group?
bet! I can send you over the party pass info, were you guys looking to secure it today?
probably today or this weekend yes we would love the info
ok i'll send you over the deets. Cool if i send through email? its a little long for text
yes of course thank you so much
bet! whats the best email for you?
just sent lmk if you got it!
word lmk what everyone thinks and once you're ready i can set up a reservation to purchase it!
do we get to pick which nights which places
theres a schedule set for that week already. so you get to choose which clubs you want but then there will be a designated day for that club
understood. which one is which night?
Monday March 2 - Booze Cruise (Day) / Maroca Nightclub (Night) Tuesday March 3 - Imagine Cave Wednesday March 4 - Booze Cruise (Day) / Coco Bongo (Night)
is there anything on the thursday and friday?
nothing off the resort but there will be a beach party thursday and the nightclub on resort will be open both nights
hey checkin in, did we wanna secure that pass?
Okay cool. So booze cruise and 2 nightclub events?
what is the price difference between 2 and 3 nightclub events
I would do all 3 tbh. all are pretty lit here are the individual prices Booze Cruise $75.00 Coco Bongo $79.00 Imagine Cave $89.00 Maroca Nightclub $68.00
hey did you wanna get that secured?
hey checkin in, any update on what we wanna do?
hey we are gonna do it just the three nights no booze cruise
okay bet. we all ready to lock it in today?
dope, heres the link to your reservation. will email it over as well. each person enters their own slot, adds their own details snd makes their own payments
you can skip the passport info area and just enter the passport country
hi spiffy. we are all set with the party pass. wondering what the protocol is... what days are we supposed to be going out and being transported ? and how do we communicate bestnfor that

Gonna email you all of these details! Our onsite staff will be in the lobby areas, look for a Go Blue Tours hospitality desk. You'll each have vouchers on your account with the events you purchased. Screenshot those and take that to the Go Blue desk to redeem your physical tickets. They will have the schedule of events happening and tell you where to be and when!
checkin in were you able to redeem your tickets?
